title: Correctly Classifying Hierarchical Categorical Data with Nested Categories and Unbalanced Subtrees
scenario: Develop a natural language processing (NLP) system to classify products into a hierarchical category tree with up to 5 levels of nesting. The system should handle unbalanced subtrees with varying numbers of categories and subcategories. The classification should be based on a given product description and the system should output the corresponding hierarchical category path in JSON format. Consider using a knowledge graph or WordNet to disambiguate word senses.
constraints: Must use the WordNet API to disambiguate word senses

evaluationCriteria.description: The output JSON should have the correct syntax and structure.
The output category path should match the true category path of the product.
The system should handle unbalanced subtrees and edge cases correctly.
The system should accurately disambiguate word senses using the WordNet API.
